artPrompt: A floating clipboard hovers at eye level in a deserted beige City Hall corridor, a cold cyan arcane glow pulsing along its blank illegible page as an unseen verdict descends. Below it, a lone trembling silhouette of a worker is half-dissolved in light, judged. Receding fluorescent tubes stretch to a hazy vanishing point. Composed as a wide film-still with deep perspective, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Compliance Wellness Check
text:
Choose one —
• You gain 4 life and put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. (Found in compliance.)
• Destroy target creature with power 4 or greater. (Found dangerously out of compliance.)
flavorText: The clipboard decides who is well and who is a workplace hazard.
